candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total/subtotal style row.
Duplicate total revenue line, useful only as fallback if label changes across years.
Non-GAAP measure, not preferred for PROF revenue.

variables.notes: Selected GAAP-style revenue labels as priority list; later code should use the first non-missing value.

candidates.row_label: Purchased Satellite Capacity and Other Direct Costs
candidates.why: Direct production/service cost tied to revenue; best match for cost of sales.
Balance sheet inventory subline, not an income statement expense.

final_choice.row_label: Purchased Satellite Capacity and Other Direct Costs

variables.notes: Best direct-cost line on the income statement.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket, likely administrative/selling external expenses.
Personnel costs are a core SG&A component when not part of COGS.
Residual overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present, so selected the best overhead component rows and excluded direct costs, D&A, impairment, interest, and taxes.

candidates.why: Represents capitalization of development costs, not a reported R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset line, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalised Expenditure for Development - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No separate reported R&D expense line is present in the provided statements. Capitalized development and amortization lines are not current-period XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; useful fallback when specific interest expense is missing.
Most direct match to interest expense; preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest subcomponent, narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental subcomponent, not preferred over main reported lines.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list prefers the specific interest expense line, then total financial expenses as fallback for years where interest expense is not separately reported.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the Parent Companys shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Acceptable fallback only if parent-attributable equity is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the Parent Companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting minority interests; included Total Equity only as fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income line, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: No balance sheet non-controlling interest/minority interest line is present. Left empty to avoid double counting with BE.
